mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_message ( message_room_id, sender_id, reply_to_message_id, content ) VALUES ( #{messageRoomId}, #{senderId}, #{replyToMessageId}, #{content} )
mapper.sql: msg.id, msg.message_room_id, msg.sender_id, sender.nickname AS sender_nickname, sender.profile_image AS sender_profile_image, CASE WHEN msg.deleted_datetime IS NOT NULL THEN '삭제된 메시지입니다.' ELSE msg.content END AS content, msg.is_read, msg.created_datetime, msg.updated_datetime, (msg.updated_datetime > msg.created_datetime AND msg.deleted_datetime IS NULL) AS edited, (msg.deleted_datetime IS NOT NULL) AS deleted, msg.reply_to_message_id, CASE WHEN reply.id IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN reply.deleted_datetime IS NOT NULL THEN '삭제된 메시지입니다.' ELSE reply.content END AS reply_preview, reply_sender.nickname AS reply_sender_nickname, COALESCE(msg.like_count, 0) AS like_count, EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM tbl_message_like message_like WHERE message_like.message_id = msg.id AND message_like.member_id = #{memberId} ) AS is_liked, (msg.sender_id = #{memberId} AND msg.deleted_datetime IS NULL AND msg.created_datetime >= now() - interval '5 minutes') AS can_edit, (msg.sender_id = #{memberId} AND msg.deleted_datetime IS NULL) AS can_delete, (msg.sender_id = #{memberId}) AS is_self
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tbl_message msg JOIN tbl_member sender ON msg.sender_id = sender.id LEFT JOIN tbl_message reply ON msg.reply_to_message_id = reply.id LEFT JOIN tbl_member reply_sender ON reply.sender_id = reply_sender.id WHERE msg.message_room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY msg.created_datetime ASC, msg.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, message_room_id, sender_id, reply_to_message_id, content, is_read, like_count, created_datetime, updated_datetime, deleted_datetime FROM tbl_message WHERE id = #{messageId}

SELECT
FROM tbl_message msg JOIN tbl_member sender ON msg.sender_id = sender.id LEFT JOIN tbl_message reply ON msg.reply_to_message_id = reply.id LEFT JOIN tbl_member reply_sender ON reply.sender_id = reply_sender.id WHERE msg.id = #{messageId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_message SET content = #{content}, updated_datetime = now() WHERE id = #{messageId} AND deleted_datetime IS NULL
UPDATE tbl_message SET deleted_datetime = now(), updated_datetime = now() WHERE id = #{messageId} AND deleted_datetime IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_message msg JOIN tbl_message_room_member mrm ON msg.message_room_id = mrm.message_room_id WHERE mrm.member_id = #{memberId} AND mrm.left_at IS NULL AND msg.sender_id != #{memberId} AND msg.is_read = false AND msg.deleted_datetime IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_message SET like_count = COALESCE(like_count, 0) + 1 WHERE id = #{messageId} AND deleted_datetime IS NULL
UPDATE tbl_message SET like_count = GREATEST(COALESCE(like_count, 0) - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{messageId} AND deleted_datetime IS NULL
